title: More QoL
description: A Modification for Minecraft which adds some QoL Features, e.g. a break safe for tools.
body:
This mod includes many toggle-able features that improve the quality of life in Minecraft! 
such as: 

- Tool breakage protection (configurable: audio/visual warning)
- Beacon effect duration display
- Beacon beam render
- Highlight same items in inventories
- Local Time

feel free to choose only those features you find the most useful for your in-game experience!
